name: Recruiter: AI search by position → candidates
description: Parameterized search via the AI Copilot (the recording's real search entry, steps 13-15): type 'Buscar candidatos para: <position>' into textarea.copilot-chat-input__textbox + submit → the AI builds & runs the search → extract candidate cards (recruiter_search_people). PARAM = the position in step 4's value. Far more reliable than the advanced facets / global box (which need finicky commit/submit). Selector from recording: textarea.copilot-chat-input__textbox.

steps.value: Buscar candidatos para: Full Stack Developer
